title: Those Who Specie
description: 21st Century Meme Resource Pack for the Species Mod
body:
Resource Pack for Species that gives it a 21st century meme makeover

Nearly all of the mob textures and sounds have been changed

[https://youtu.be/Jb1Kk7f4pSA](https://youtu.be/Jb1Kk7f4pSA)
